race.comment: SUPERGRACE (10) returnd from a short break after a 1L defeat over 1479m at Kyneton. Fitness levels maintained by a recent Flemington jumpout placing. Has the inside barrier and the blinker on for the first time, and she will be tough to roll in this line-up. REGAL VISIONS (11) resumes for a top metro stable fitter for three jumpouts. Placed second in the most recent at Flemington, and the blinkers are applied for the first time. Maps for a soft run with Stackhouse in the saddle, and a bold run is anticipated. MUKATILA (9) improved sharply when narrowly beaten over 1300m at Swan Hill, and didn't have the best of it. Has an awkward gate, but can make the finish. FRESHWATER FOX (7) debuts and has been well educated. Placed in two recent Geelong jumpouts, and has the blinkers fitted. Has to be kept onside.
